acts.title: Companies Act, 2013
acts.summary: Governs the incorporation, responsibilities, governance, and dissolution of companies in India, including rules on board structure, audit, disclosure, share capital, and director duties.

acts.title: PMLA Act, 2002 (Prevention of Money Laundering Act)
acts.lastAmended: Amended in line with FATF standards
acts.summary: Forms the legal core of India's AML/CFT framework. Mandates that financial institutions and NBFCs verify client identity, maintain transaction records, and report suspicious transactions to FIU-IND.

acts.title: Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934
acts.summary: Establishes the Reserve Bank of India and provides the statutory framework for the regulation of NBFCs under Chapter III-B, governing registration, reserve funds, and directions.

acts.title: Prevention of Money Laundering (Maintenance of Records) Rules, 2005
acts.summary: Detailed rules under PMLA defining standard customer due diligence (CDD) procedures, transaction reporting forms (CTR, STR, CCR), and record preservation periods (5 years).

acts.title: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
acts.summary: Establishes SEBI as the regulatory body for India's securities markets. Grants powers to protect investors, promote market development, and regulate intermediaries and listed companies.

acts.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023
acts.summary: Regulates the processing of digital personal data in India. Requires data fiduciaries (like fintechs/NBFCs) to obtain explicit consent, ensure data accuracy, implement security safeguards, and respect user rights.

acts.title: Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005
acts.summary: Governs credit bureaus (CIBIL, Equifax, Experian, CRIF High Mark) in India. Mandates that all lending NBFCs become members of all four CICs and update credit data monthly.

acts.title: Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (FEMA)
acts.summary: Governs cross-border trade, external commercial borrowings (ECB), and foreign direct investments (FDI) in Indian companies, including compliance for foreign-owned fintech entities.

acts.title: Information Technology Act, 2000
acts.summary: Provides legal recognition for electronic transactions, digital signatures, and electronic records. Outlines liability for data leaks, cybercrimes, and security procedures for corporations.

acts.title: Consumer Protection Act, 2019
acts.summary: Protects consumer interests against unfair trade practices and product liability. Sets rules on consumer dispute redressing forums and applies to digital lending services and fintech applications.
